name: Google Drive API
description: The Google Drive API allows clients to access resources from Google Drive. It enables file management, sharing, comments, revisions, and shared drive operations.

capabilities.name: about_get
capabilities.description: Get information about the user, the user's Drive, and system capabilities.

capabilities.name: files_list
capabilities.description: List files in the user's Drive.

capabilities.name: files_get
capabilities.description: Get a file's metadata by ID.

capabilities.name: files_create
capabilities.description: Create a new file or folder in Drive (metadata only, no content upload).

capabilities.name: files_update
capabilities.description: Update a file's metadata and/or content.

capabilities.name: files_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a file (bypasses trash).

capabilities.name: files_copy
capabilities.description: Create a copy of a file.

capabilities.name: files_export
capabilities.description: Export a Google Workspace document to the requested MIME type.

capabilities.name: files_generate_ids
capabilities.description: Generate a set of file IDs for future uploads.

capabilities.name: files_empty_trash
capabilities.description: Permanently delete all trashed files.

capabilities.name: files_watch
capabilities.description: Subscribe to push notifications for changes to a file.

capabilities.name: files_list_labels
capabilities.description: List the labels on a file.

capabilities.name: files_modify_labels
capabilities.description: Modify the set of labels applied to a file.

capabilities.name: permissions_create
capabilities.description: Create a permission for a file or shared drive (share with a user/group).

capabilities.name: permissions_list
capabilities.description: List all permissions for a file.

capabilities.name: permissions_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific permission for a file.

capabilities.name: permissions_update
capabilities.description: Update a permission for a file.

capabilities.name: permissions_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a permission from a file.

capabilities.name: comments_create
capabilities.description: Create a comment on a file.

capabilities.name: comments_list
capabilities.description: List all comments on a file.

capabilities.name: comments_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific comment on a file.

capabilities.name: comments_update
capabilities.description: Update a comment on a file.

capabilities.name: comments_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a comment from a file.

capabilities.name: replies_create
capabilities.description: Create a reply to a comment.

capabilities.name: replies_list
capabilities.description: List all replies to a comment.

capabilities.name: replies_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific reply to a comment.

capabilities.name: replies_update
capabilities.description: Update a reply to a comment.

capabilities.name: replies_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a reply to a comment.

capabilities.name: drives_create
capabilities.description: Create a new shared drive.

capabilities.name: drives_list
capabilities.description: List all shared drives.

capabilities.name: drives_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific shared drive.

capabilities.name: drives_update
capabilities.description: Update a shared drive's metadata.

capabilities.name: drives_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a shared drive (must be empty).

capabilities.name: drives_hide
capabilities.description: Hide a shared drive from the default view.

capabilities.name: drives_unhide
capabilities.description: Restore a shared drive to the default view.

capabilities.name: changes_get_start_page_token
capabilities.description: Get the starting pageToken for listing future changes.

capabilities.name: changes_list
capabilities.description: List changes to files and shared drives.

capabilities.name: changes_watch
capabilities.description: Subscribe to push notifications for changes.

capabilities.name: channels_stop
capabilities.description: Stop watching resources through a channel.

capabilities.name: revisions_list
capabilities.description: List a file's revisions.

capabilities.name: revisions_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific revision's metadata or content.

capabilities.name: revisions_update
capabilities.description: Update a revision.

capabilities.name: revisions_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a file revision.

capabilities.name: apps_list
capabilities.description: List a user's installed apps.

capabilities.name: apps_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific installed app.

capabilities.name: operations_get
capabilities.description: Get the latest state of a long-running operation.
